gates.f2: All mapped mandatory requirements must be met, evidenced, validated, and approved or formally risk accepted according to the go-live decision matrix.
CFG-BRD-A-002: Configure customer coverage requirements capability for monitor new, existing, dormant, reactivated, and closed accounts where data retention and activity risk require monitoring
gates.f3: FIELD-CUST: Customer ID, segment, nationality/residence, CRR, PEP/TFS status, KYC profile, SOF/SOW, occupation/business activity, expected activity

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-F-003: Configure risk-based monitoring requirements capability for apply enhanced monitoring to high-risk customers and high-risk geographies
gates.f3: FIELD-CUST: Customer ID, segment, nationality/residence, CRR, PEP/TFS status, KYC profile, SOF/SOW, occupation/business activity, expected activity

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-H-004: Configure threshold configuration requirements capability for retain version-controlled threshold rationale and test evidence
gates.f3: FIELD-CORE: Customer, account, transaction, risk rating, product, channel, geography, and alert/case identifiers

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-K-004: Configure investigation requirements capability for support no tipping-off control prompts and restrictions during investigations
gates.f3: FIELD-FRAUD: Device ID, IP, velocity, failed/reversed transactions, linked accounts, fraud flags, mule indicators

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-L-002: Configure str / sar escalation requirements capability for document STR/SAR decisions, rationale, supporting evidence, and MLRO approval
gates.f3: FIELD-CORE: Customer, account, transaction, risk rating, product, channel, geography, and alert/case identifiers

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-L-003: Configure str / sar escalation requirements capability for support goAML or relevant reporting process evidence tracking
gates.f3: FIELD-CORE: Customer, account, transaction, risk rating, product, channel, geography, and alert/case identifiers

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-P-001: Configure reporting and mi requirements capability for provide dashboards for alert volumes, ageing, backlog, productivity, scenario performance, and high-risk alerts
gates.f3: FIELD-CORE: Customer, account, transaction, risk rating, product, channel, geography, and alert/case identifiers

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-P-002: Configure reporting and mi requirements capability for report STR/SAR escalations, open/closed cases, overdue cases, QA outcomes, and tuning results
gates.f3: FIELD-CORE: Customer, account, transaction, risk rating, product, channel, geography, and alert/case identifiers

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-Q-001: Configure audit trail requirements capability for record user login, rule changes, threshold changes, alert decisions, case notes, escalations, and STR/SAR decisions
gates.f3: FIELD-AUDIT: User ID, role, action, timestamp, old/new value, approval ID, case/alert reference

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-Q-004: Configure audit trail requirements capability for support timely retrieval/export for audit and regulatory inspection
gates.f3: FIELD-AUDIT: User ID, role, action, timestamp, old/new value, approval ID, case/alert reference

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-R-001: Configure user access requirements capability for enforce role-based access and segregation of duties
gates.f3: FIELD-AUDIT: User ID, role, action, timestamp, old/new value, approval ID, case/alert reference

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-R-003: Configure user access requirements capability for apply maker-checker controls to configuration, threshold, and material workflow changes
gates.f3: FIELD-AUDIT: User ID, role, action, timestamp, old/new value, approval ID, case/alert reference

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-T-002: Configure system integration requirements capability for support API, batch, file transfer, database view, or approved integration method
gates.f3: FIELD-CORE: Customer, account, transaction, risk rating, product, channel, geography, and alert/case identifiers

gates.f2: CFG-BRD-U-003: Configure testing and go-live requirements capability for close critical defects and remediate or formally risk accept high defects with compensating controls
gates.f3: FIELD-CORE: Customer, account, transaction, risk rating, product, channel, geography, and alert/case identifiers
